outputs.description: The number of users that delete from inbox actions were attempted for. Tessian.DeleteFromQuarantineOutput.number_of_actions_succeeded The number of users that the delete from inbox action was successful for.

outputs.description: The results of the delete action. This is an array of objects mapping the email address of users to the result of the delete action. Tessian.DeleteFromQuarantineOutput.event_id The event ID that was submitted for deletion.
outputs.name: Tessian.DeleteFromQuarantineOutput.results
